summary: 7 film announcements, 6 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Disconnected
film.talent: Kayla Ewell, Brian Dietzen, cast from 'Everybody Still Hates Chris'
film.announcement: Feature film about teen deepfakes and cyberbullying with Kayla Ewell and Brian Dietzen headlining.

film.title: Armani: The King of Fashion
film.announcement: Giorgio Armani biopic with director Bille August attached to helm the project.

film.title: Chatlines
film.announcement: Queer sci-fi movie about a couple who meet on a Chatroulette-style app lands UK theatrical distribution.

film.title: Clarissa
film.announcement: Neon sets theatrical release date for Esiri Twins' Lagos-set reimagining of 'Mrs. Dalloway' starring Sophie Okonedo.

film.title: New York Knicks Championship Documentary
film.announcement: Filmmaker Travon Free teams with Blink49 Creator Studios and 1Community for a documentary on the New York Knicks championship.

film.title: The Horseman
film.announcement: Western film from Nomadic Pictures with Barry Pepper and Kiefer Sutherland headlining for Scripps Networks.

film.title: Possession
film.announcement: Paul Dano boards the 'Possession' remake at Paramount.

tv.title: The Escape Room
tv.announcement: Dwight Howard stars in vertical series 'The Escape Room' as among launch titles for streaming platform Tap In Shorts.

tv.title: The Surf House
tv.announcement: Netflix developing Lucy Clarke's thriller 'The Surf House' for television adaptation.

tv.title: Breslau
tv.announcement: Disney+ renews Polish drama 'Breslau' for season 2 and orders two more shows from Central Europe.

tv.title: Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War – The Calamity
tv.announcement: Anime series sets July premiere on Hulu and Disney+ via Viz Media.

tv.title: The Wolf
tv.announcement: Matt Smith to star in Quinn Audio original drama 'The Wolf'.

tv.title: A Shop for Killers
tv.announcement: Disney+ hit Korean series 'A Shop for Killers' sets season 2 premiere date.
